title: Serverly Optimized
body:
Fabric Modpack aimed at optimizing server performance while adding minor Server-Side utilities while not altering the core vanilla experience
Utilities: - Dynmap (not available in latest version) - Armor Poser - Craftable Bundles (not needed in latest version) - Sensible Sleepiniess (not available in latest version) - OpLock (not available in latest version) - No Chat Reports
Vanilla Tweaks Datapacks - AFK Display - Coordinates Hud - Durability Ping - Nether Portal Coords - Player Head Drops - Silence Mobs - Spawning Spheres - Track Raw Statistics - Track Statistics - Wandering Trades (Mini Blocks)


Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: [Vanilla Tweaks Website](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
Inspired by [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)
Modpack Icon: Seo and web icons created by Eucalyp - Flaticon
